scope: Active projects under /home/ozand/herkoot/Projects plus the Nanobot dashboard control loop.

roles.observer: Collects and preserves truth without changing scope.
roles.diagnostician: Detects stagnation, ownership drift, and escalation thresholds.
roles.executor: Takes the next bounded action inside the current project scope.
roles.owner: Accountable for keeping the project moving and for escalation hygiene.
roles.approver: Authorizes release, infrastructure, or privilege changes.
roles.operator: Human system steward for this host; final fallback for unresolved escalations.

projects.name: Nanobot eeepc control loop
projects.next_bounded_action: Use the dashboard to identify one file-level or config-level fix; execute it if safe, otherwise escalate with the exact blocker and the next bounded slice.

projects.name: OpenSpace
projects.next_bounded_action: Advance one concrete code, docs, or verification slice; escalate if the next step is blocked by access, ambiguity, or a missing owner.

projects.name: aparser-cli
projects.next_bounded_action: Keep the CLI moving with one bounded implementation or cleanup slice, then verify it before widening scope.

projects.name: private-skills-repo
projects.next_bounded_action: Maintain governance quality: one bounded review, improvement, or verification step at a time.
